title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries. Police are investigating a 'planned fight' as the cause.
charlotte_impact: Highlights rising gun violence and its impact on community spaces, raising concerns about public safety and the need for preventative measures.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop in Charlotte
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14, 2026, at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation and collaboration in polymer science, potentially boosting the local economy and technological advancement.

title: Suspect Arrested in Charlotte Grocery Store Stabbing
summary: Police have apprehended a woman with a criminal history for stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about random acts of violence and the effectiveness of the justice system in preventing repeat offenses.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman at Harris Teeter
summary: Marvina Butler-Hardy, a repeat offender, is accused of stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte Harris Teeter parking lot. She has nine prior convictions.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about the effectiveness of rehabilitation programs and the potential for repeat offenders to commit violent crimes.

title: Braylon Clark Details Visit with Tennessee Football
summary: 2028 Charlotte Country Day wide-out Braylon Clark visits Knoxville to explore opportunities with Tennessee Football.
charlotte_impact: Showcases local talent and the potential for young athletes to pursue collegiate opportunities outside of North Carolina.

title: Choosing the Best Deck Builder in Charlotte
summary: Guide on selecting a deck builder in Charlotte to enhance living space, outdoor enjoyment, and property value through home upgrades.
charlotte_impact: Provides valuable information for homeowners looking to improve their property, contributing to local business and home improvement.

title: Cooler Temperatures Forecasted After Weekend Rain
summary: The Charlotte area can expect cooler temperatures in the 70s throughout the upcoming week following weekend rainfall.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather update relevant to daily planning and outdoor activities for residents in the Charlotte area.

title: Kannapolis Lifts Boil Water Advisory After E. coli Contamination
summary: Kannapolis has lifted the boil water advisory after E. coli contamination, allowing residents to resume normal water usage.
charlotte_impact: Restores access to safe drinking water and alleviates concerns about public health risks in the Kannapolis community.

title: Camp North End Adds Curfew for Minors Amid Safety Concerns
summary: Camp North End implements a curfew for minors to address safety concerns, aiming to maintain a safe environment for all visitors.
charlotte_impact: Reflects efforts to balance community access with safety measures, potentially impacting local businesses and public perception.

title: Wastewater Spill Reaches Sugar Creek in West Charlotte
summary: A wastewater spill has reached Sugar Creek in west Charlotte, raising environmental concerns and prompting cleanup efforts.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of infrastructure maintenance and environmental protection to prevent pollution and safeguard local waterways.

title: Teenager Arrested in Deadly Shooting at Concord Park
summary: A teenager has been arrested in connection with a deadly shooting that occurred in the parking lot of Hartsell Park in Concord.
charlotte_impact: Addresses concerns about youth violence and the need for community interventions to prevent future incidents.

title: Lenoir Man Killed in Overnight Collision
summary: A Lenoir man died in an overnight collision. Speed and impairment were contributing factors, according to the North Carolina State Highway Patrol.
charlotte_impact: Reinforces the dangers of impaired driving and speeding, emphasizing the need for responsible driving habits to prevent accidents.

title: Volunteer Firefighter Dies While Battling Wildfire in Florida
summary: A volunteer firefighter died while battling a wildfire in Florida during brushfire suppression operations.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the risks faced by first responders and the importance of wildfire prevention and safety measures.

title: NC Lawmakers Investigate Deadly Child Abuse Case in Charlotte
summary: North Carolina lawmakers are investigating the death of Dominque Moody, a child abuse case in Charlotte involving horrific allegations.
charlotte_impact: Raises awareness about child abuse and the need for improved child protective services and community support systems.

title: Kannapolis Firefighters Distribute Water Amid E. coli Boil Advisory
summary: Kannapolis firefighters distributed cases of water after E. coli contamination prompted a boil water advisory for all of Kannapolis.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates community support and resourcefulness in addressing public health emergencies and ensuring access to essential resources.
